meta.title: GCP-ADP-2: BigQuery Pipelines, Governance and Reporting

questions.stem: A team needs to **land raw files cheaply and durably before analysis**. Which service or feature is the best fit?

options.explanation: It is Google Cloud's managed object storage service for raw files and staging areas
It is not the primary managed governance layer for organizing cloud data estates
It is not the standard BigQuery object for reusable SQL definitions over existing tables
It is not the standard serverless option for recurring BigQuery SQL execution

questions.stem: A team needs to **query files in Cloud Storage without loading them into native BigQuery storage**. Which service or feature is the best fit?
